_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-04 03:11:52Z)**_

The Vite dev server starts successfully (ready on port 8788) but then crashes because it tries to read from stdin (TTY) for its interactive CLI ("press h + enter to show help"), which fails since it's running as a background process with no TTY attached.

The fix is to pipe stdin from `/dev/null` so Vite doesn't try to read from a terminal:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-04 03:12:49Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Edit"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Edit**</summary>

```text
The file /Users/grant/code/nasa-apod/package.json has been updated successfully.
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-04 03:12:52Z)**_

Now stop the existing servers and restart:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-04 03:12:53Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Stop existing dev servers

`npm run stop`

```text
> stop
> lsof -ti:8787,8788 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null && echo 'Dev servers stopped' || echo 'No servers running'

Dev servers stopped
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-04 03:12:56Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Start dev servers

`npm run dev`

```text
> dev
> mkdir -p logs && wrangler dev > logs/api.log 2>&1 & npm run dev:landing < /dev/null > logs/landing.log 2>&1 & echo 'Dev servers started
>   API:     http://localhost:8787
>   Landing: http://localhost:8788
> 
> Run npm run log to watch output'

Dev servers started
  API:     http://localhost:8787
  Landing: http://localhost:8788

Run npm run log to watch output
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-04 03:13:03Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Check both server logs

`sleep 2 && npm run log:tail`

```text
> log:tail
> tail -20 logs/api.log logs/landing.log

==> logs/api.log <==

 ⛅️ wrangler 4.77.0 (update available 4.80.0)
─────────────────────────────────────────────
⎔ Starting local server...
[wrangler:info] Ready on http://localhost:8787

==> logs/landing.log <==

> dev:landing
> cd landing && npx vite


  VITE v6.4.1  ready in 140 ms

  ➜  Local:   http://localhost:8788/
  ➜  Network: use --host to expose
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-04 03:13:07Z)**_

Both servers are running cleanly now. The issue was that Vite's interactive CLI tried to read from stdin, which doesn't exist when running as a background process. Adding `< /dev/null` redirects stdin so Vite skips its interactive mode.
